As a biodiversity data scientist, combine satellite imagery, acoustic sensors, and species occurrence records to predict habitat loss impacts for commercially important pollinators.
As a food safety scientist, develop a rapid metagenomic workflow to detect contamination, spoilage organisms, and antimicrobial resistance genes across a ready-to-eat food supply chain.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the life-cycle greenhouse gas emissions of green hydrogen produced by electrolysis versus steam methane reforming with carbon capture. What chemistry and process variables most strongly determine whether hydrogen pathways deliver real climate benefits?

As a policy-maker, I need research on the environmental persistence, toxicity, and degradation pathways of PFAS alternatives used in consumer products and industrial processes. Which substitutes are genuinely safer, and which risk repeating the same contamination problems?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the feasibility of replacing critical metals in lithium-ion batteries with more abundant elements. What trade-offs in energy density, safety, cost, recyclability, and supply-chain resilience should guide public investment?

As a policy-maker, I need research on chemical recycling technologies for plastics, including pyrolysis, solvolysis, and depolymerization. Which methods reduce waste and emissions under real-world operating conditions, and which create unacceptable pollution or energy burdens?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the health impacts of microplastics and nanoplastics in drinking water, food, and air. What analytical chemistry methods are most reliable for measuring exposure, and what regulatory thresholds would be scientifically defensible?

As a policy-maker, I need research on low-carbon cement chemistry, including alternative binders, carbonation curing, and supplementary cementitious materials. Which options can scale while maintaining structural performance and reducing total emissions?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the environmental and public health consequences of pesticide mixtures rather than single active ingredients. How should chemical risk assessment account for additive, synergistic, or antagonistic effects?

As a policy-maker, I need research on sustainable fertilizer production, including green ammonia and enhanced-efficiency nitrogen products. What chemical innovations can reduce nitrous oxide emissions, nitrate pollution, and farmer costs?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on direct air capture sorbents and solvents, including their durability, regeneration energy, toxicity, and supply requirements. Which materials are most suitable for large-scale deployment without creating new environmental risks?

As a policy-maker, I need research on the chemistry of wildfire smoke, including secondary organic aerosol formation and toxic transformation products. What evidence should guide air-quality alerts, building standards, and worker protections?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on lead, arsenic, and other toxic metals in drinking water infrastructure. Which treatment chemistries and corrosion-control strategies are most effective across different water sources and pipe materials?

As a policy-maker, I need research on biodegradable plastics and their actual degradation behavior in soil, marine environments, composting facilities, and landfills. Which chemical structures and standards best predict safe end-of-life outcomes?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on pharmaceutical residues in wastewater and surface waters. Which advanced oxidation, adsorption, membrane, or biological treatment chemistries provide the greatest risk reduction per dollar spent?

As a policy-maker, I need research on safer-by-design flame retardants. Which chemical classes can meet fire-safety standards while minimizing persistence, bioaccumulation, endocrine disruption, and indoor exposure?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on indoor air chemistry from cleaning products, fragrances, cooking emissions, and building materials. What compounds and reaction products pose the greatest health risks, and how should labeling or ventilation standards respond?

As a policy-maker, I need research on recycling rare earth elements from electronics, magnets, and industrial waste. Which separation chemistries are efficient, low-toxicity, and economically viable at scale?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the safety and environmental performance of next-generation nuclear fuel processing and waste immobilization materials. Which chemical forms best minimize long-term radionuclide mobility?

As a policy-maker, I need research on carbon dioxide utilization pathways, including mineralization, fuels, polymers, and chemicals. Which products provide durable carbon storage or meaningful emissions reductions when assessed by rigorous life-cycle analysis?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on green solvent adoption in pharmaceutical and fine chemical manufacturing. Which alternatives reduce toxicity and waste without compromising product quality, worker safety, or manufacturing reliability?

As a policy-maker, I need research on antimicrobial chemicals used in consumer products, healthcare, and agriculture. What evidence links their environmental release to antimicrobial resistance, ecosystem effects, or human exposure risks?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the chemical fate of oil spill dispersants in marine and coastal environments. Under what conditions do dispersants reduce ecological harm, and when do they worsen toxicity or persistence?

As a policy-maker, I need research on atmospheric methane oxidation chemistry and the potential consequences of proposed methane removal technologies. What risks could arise from altering oxidant chemistry or creating harmful byproducts?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on endocrine-disrupting chemicals in food packaging, cosmetics, and household goods. Which exposure pathways and compound classes should be prioritized for regulation based on strength of evidence?

As a policy-maker, I need research on safer alternatives to chlorinated solvents used in metal cleaning, dry cleaning, and manufacturing. What substitution strategies reduce cancer risks, groundwater contamination, and occupational exposure?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the chemistry of algal blooms, including nutrient cycling, toxin formation, and treatment byproducts. Which interventions most effectively reduce human health risks and protect drinking water supplies?

As a policy-maker, I need research on battery fire chemistry, including gas emissions, thermal runaway mechanisms, and extinguishing agents. What evidence should guide transport rules, building codes, recycling-site safety, and emergency response?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on advanced water desalination materials, including membranes, electrodialysis systems, and anti-fouling coatings. Which chemistries lower energy use and brine impacts while remaining durable and affordable?

As a policy-maker, I need research on chemical contaminants in recycled materials used for packaging, textiles, and construction. How can standards ensure circular economy goals do not reintroduce hazardous substances into consumer products?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the atmospheric chemistry of low-global-warming-potential refrigerants. What are their degradation products, environmental lifetimes, flammability risks, and implications for air quality and climate policy?

As a policy-maker, I need research on the safety and performance of perovskite solar cell materials. How can lead leakage, solvent use, material stability, and end-of-life recycling be managed before large-scale deployment?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on chemical exposure risks for workers in semiconductor manufacturing. Which solvents, photoresists, etchants, and process byproducts require stronger monitoring, substitution, or controls?

As a policy-maker, I need research on the use of catalysis to decarbonize chemical manufacturing. Which catalytic processes offer the largest emissions reductions for high-volume chemicals such as ethylene, methanol, ammonia, and aromatics?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on mercury cycling in aquatic systems, including methylation chemistry and bioaccumulation in fish. Which pollution-control measures most effectively reduce human dietary exposure over time?

As a policy-maker, I need research on chemical additives in textiles, including dyes, water repellents, antimicrobials, and finishing agents. Which substances pose the greatest risks during production, use, washing, recycling, and disposal?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the environmental fate of nanoparticles used in sunscreens, coatings, agriculture, and medicine. How do particle size, surface chemistry, and transformations affect toxicity and regulation?

As a policy-maker, I need research on food contact materials and migration chemistry under realistic storage, heating, and reuse conditions. Which additives, monomers, or degradation products should be prioritized for exposure reduction?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on urban soil contamination from legacy industry, traffic, pesticides, and building materials. Which chemical testing, remediation, and land-use policies best protect children and support safe redevelopment?

As a policy-maker, I need research on sustainable aviation fuel chemistry, including synthetic fuels, biofuels, and power-to-liquid pathways. Which feedstocks and conversion processes deliver the strongest emissions reductions without worsening land, water, or air pollution?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the chemical risks and benefits of using treated wastewater for irrigation, industry, and groundwater recharge. Which contaminants of emerging concern require monitoring, and which treatment barriers are most reliable?

As a policy-maker, I need research on rapid, low-cost chemical sensing for environmental enforcement and public health protection. Which sensor technologies can provide accurate field detection of toxic gases, metals, pesticides, and industrial pollutants?

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating how sleep spindle density influences hippocampal-cortical memory consolidation in older adults. Focus critique on whether the design can distinguish age-related neural compensation from pathology-linked decline.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing whether gut microbiome diversity predicts microglial activation and depressive symptoms after chronic stress. Evaluate the plausibility of the mechanistic link and whether the proposed biomarkers are sufficient.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal using high-density EEG to identify early neural signatures of dyslexia in pre-reading children. Assess whether the study design adequately separates language-specific deficits from broader attentional differences.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal examining how dopamine release dynamics in the striatum shape exploration-exploitation decisions. Critique the proposed behavioral task, measurement strategy, and causal inference.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal studying whether transcranial magnetic stimulation of the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex improves cognitive control in treatment-resistant depression. Comment on target selection, sham control, and clinical outcome measures.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal mapping single-cell transcriptomic changes in the substantia nigra during prodromal Parkinson's disease. Evaluate feasibility, sampling limitations, and translational relevance.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating how early-life adversity alters amygdala-prefrontal connectivity during adolescent emotion regulation. Assess whether the proposal accounts for confounds such as socioeconomic status, medication, and comorbid anxiety.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal using optogenetics in rodents to test whether cerebellar circuits contribute to social prediction errors. Critique the conceptual novelty and whether the behavioral readouts convincingly measure social prediction.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal examining the neural basis of chronic pain chronification using longitudinal fMRI after acute injury. Evaluate whether the timeline, sample size, and pain phenotyping are adequate.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing whether astrocyte calcium signaling modulates synaptic plasticity during motor learning. Focus on the specificity of astrocyte manipulation and interpretation of learning-related neural changes.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating neural entrainment to speech rhythms in bilingual children. Assess whether the study can distinguish bilingual experience effects from language proficiency and auditory attention.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal exploring whether blood-brain barrier permeability predicts cognitive decline after mild traumatic brain injury. Critique the imaging methods, longitudinal design, and clinical relevance.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing the role of locus coeruleus norepinephrine signaling in uncertainty-driven attention. Evaluate the suitability of pupillometry, pharmacological manipulation, and computational modeling.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal examining how menstrual cycle phase affects reward circuitry and reinforcement learning. Comment on hormonal measurement, within-subject design, and interpretation of sex-related variability.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal studying synaptic pruning abnormalities in autism spectrum disorder using induced pluripotent stem cell-derived neurons and microglia. Assess model validity, developmental relevance, and potential overinterpretation.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal using closed-loop deep brain stimulation to reduce freezing of gait in Parkinson's disease. Critique the proposed neural trigger, stimulation parameters, and patient selection criteria.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating whether mindfulness training alters default mode network dynamics and rumination in anxiety disorders. Evaluate control conditions, expectancy effects, and neural-behavioral linkage.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing how visual cortex plasticity changes after adult-onset blindness. Assess whether the methods can separate cross-modal reorganization from task difficulty and compensatory strategy use.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal examining the contribution of oligodendrocyte dysfunction to working memory impairment in schizophrenia. Critique the proposed imaging markers, causal claims, and relevance to clinical heterogeneity.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal using intracranial recordings to study hippocampal replay during human spatial navigation. Evaluate ethical feasibility, task design, and whether replay detection criteria are rigorous.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating how neuroinflammation influences seizure susceptibility after viral infection. Assess the appropriateness of animal models, inflammatory markers, and translational implications.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing whether real-time fMRI neurofeedback can train individuals to regulate amygdala responses to threat. Comment on control feedback, durability of learning, and clinical applicability.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal examining cortical representation of prosthetic limb ownership in upper-limb amputees. Evaluate whether the proposed neural measures capture embodiment rather than motor effort or visual familiarity.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal studying how circadian disruption affects glymphatic clearance and Alzheimer's disease biomarkers. Critique the measurement approach, temporal sampling, and mechanistic specificity.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating neural mechanisms of placebo analgesia using combined fMRI and endogenous opioid blockade. Assess the strength of the causal test and adequacy of blinding procedures.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing whether cerebellar transcranial direct current stimulation enhances language prediction in aphasia recovery. Evaluate target rationale, stimulation montage, and rehabilitation outcome measures.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal mapping developmental changes in functional connectome flexibility from childhood to young adulthood. Critique the longitudinal design, motion correction strategy, and interpretation of network flexibility.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating the role of thalamocortical oscillations in absence epilepsy. Assess whether the proposed recordings and perturbations can identify causal circuit mechanisms.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal examining how social isolation alters reward sensitivity and nucleus accumbens activity in adolescents. Evaluate ethical considerations, ecological validity, and vulnerability to confounding variables.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing whether auditory hallucinations arise from impaired corollary discharge during inner speech. Critique the task design, patient stratification, and neural evidence required.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal studying axonal regeneration after spinal cord injury using biomaterial scaffolds and activity-dependent stimulation. Assess feasibility, functional outcome metrics, and translational barriers.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating how ketamine rapidly alters synaptic connectivity in prefrontal circuits during antidepressant response. Evaluate whether the proposed measures can distinguish direct drug effects from symptom improvement.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal using machine learning on multimodal neuroimaging to predict conversion from mild cognitive impairment to Alzheimer's disease. Critique model validation, interpretability, and risk of dataset bias.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing whether vagus nerve stimulation enhances fear extinction in post-traumatic stress disorder. Assess stimulation timing, safety monitoring, and appropriateness of extinction-based endpoints.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal examining neural coding of interoceptive signals in the insula during anxiety and panic symptoms. Evaluate task validity, physiological measurements, and causal interpretation.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating how exercise-induced myokines influence hippocampal neurogenesis and memory in aging. Critique biomarker selection, intervention intensity, and evidence for brain-specific effects.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal studying developmental critical periods for auditory cortex plasticity after cochlear implantation. Assess participant variability, timing of implantation, and outcome measures for language development.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal testing whether predictive coding abnormalities explain sensory hypersensitivity in autism. Evaluate the computational model, sensory paradigms, and links between neural signals and subjective experience.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal examining the effects of air pollution exposure on neurodevelopmental trajectories and cortical maturation. Critique exposure assessment, socioeconomic confounds, and longitudinal neuroimaging measures.

Please peer-review a 2-3 sentence proposal investigating how hippocampal sharp-wave ripples support imagination of future events. Assess whether the experimental design can distinguish episodic simulation from memory retrieval and semantic construction.

As a clinical pharmacology lead, how can I use PBPK modeling to predict dose adjustments for a new oral kinase inhibitor in patients with moderate hepatic impairment before committing to a dedicated clinical trial?
As a pharmacovigilance scientist, how can I detect and validate an emerging safety signal for QT prolongation from spontaneous reports, EHR data, and wearable ECG data?
As a formulation scientist, what excipient strategy can improve the solubility and bioavailability of a poorly water-soluble BCS Class II compound without creating food-effect variability?
As a regulatory pharmacology director, how should I design a first-in-human dose-escalation strategy for a monoclonal antibody with limited nonclinical toxicology data?
As a hospital pharmacy innovation manager, how can I reduce medication errors associated with look-alike/sound-alike injectable drugs in high-acuity settings?
As an antimicrobial stewardship lead in industry, how can I model the market and clinical value of a new narrow-spectrum antibiotic while minimizing resistance emergence?
As an oncology clinical development scientist, how can I identify rational drug combination partners for a checkpoint inhibitor using tumor microenvironment biomarkers?
As a pharmacometrics expert, how can I build a population PK/PD model that supports once-monthly dosing for a long-acting injectable antipsychotic?
As a pediatric drug development lead, what evidence is needed to extrapolate adult efficacy data to children while safely selecting age-appropriate doses?
As a bioanalytical lab director, how can I improve LC-MS/MS assay sensitivity and reproducibility for measuring ultra-low concentrations of a peptide therapeutic?
As a real-world evidence strategist, how can I assess comparative effectiveness of two diabetes therapies using claims and EHR data while controlling for confounding by indication?
As a drug safety physician, how can I distinguish true drug-induced liver injury from background liver enzyme elevations in patients receiving complex polypharmacy?
As a pharmacogenomics program lead, how can I implement CYP2C19 genotype-guided dosing for antiplatelet therapy across a large health system?
As a biologics development scientist, how can I predict and reduce immunogenicity risk for a subcutaneously administered fusion protein?
As a supply chain quality lead, how can I ensure pharmacological stability and potency of temperature-sensitive biologics during last-mile cold-chain distribution?
As a CNS drug discovery scientist, what delivery technologies can increase blood-brain barrier penetration for a neuroprotective small molecule without increasing systemic toxicity?
As a clinical operations lead, how can I use digital adherence monitoring to improve dose compliance in a Phase III trial of an oral antiviral?
As a medical affairs lead, how can I generate evidence that supports appropriate deprescribing of sedative-hypnotics in older adults without compromising patient satisfaction?
As a toxicologist in preclinical development, how can I evaluate whether an observed rodent thyroid tumor signal is relevant to human risk?
As a biosimilar development lead, what analytical, pharmacokinetic, and clinical evidence is sufficient to demonstrate interchangeability for a proposed biosimilar monoclonal antibody?
As a respiratory formulation scientist, how can I optimize particle size distribution and device performance for a dry powder inhaler intended for patients with low inspiratory flow?
As a market access pharmacologist, how can I quantify the value of reduced hospitalization from a heart failure therapy using both clinical trial and real-world data?
As a drug-drug interaction specialist, how can I assess the clinical relevance of transporter-mediated interactions between a new antiviral and commonly prescribed statins?
As a women’s health clinical scientist, how can I evaluate teratogenic risk for a chronic therapy when pregnant patients are excluded from pivotal trials?
As an orphan drug development lead, how can I design an efficient trial for an ultra-rare metabolic disorder using natural history data and adaptive endpoints?
As a manufacturing pharmacology liaison, how can I assess whether switching to continuous manufacturing affects dissolution, exposure, and therapeutic equivalence for an oral tablet?
As a hospital formulary decision-maker, how can I compare extended-infusion versus intermittent-infusion beta-lactam dosing protocols for critically ill patients?
As a vaccine adjuvant researcher, how can I identify an adjuvant that improves immune response durability in older adults without increasing reactogenicity?
As a dermatology formulation lead, how can I optimize a topical corticosteroid formulation to maximize local efficacy while minimizing systemic absorption and skin atrophy risk?
As a precision oncology strategist, how can I validate a companion diagnostic that predicts response to a targeted therapy across multiple tumor types?
As a pharmacology data scientist, how can I use machine learning to prioritize compounds with favorable ADME profiles while preserving mechanistic interpretability?
As a clinical safety lead, how can I evaluate cardiovascular risk for a weight-loss drug using integrated trial data and post-marketing surveillance?
As a pain therapeutics developer, how can I design an abuse-deterrent opioid formulation that maintains analgesic efficacy while reducing tampering and misuse potential?
As a nephrology clinical pharmacologist, how can I determine safe and effective dosing for a renally cleared antibiotic in patients receiving continuous renal replacement therapy?
As a medication access strategist, how can I evaluate whether therapeutic drug monitoring for biologic therapy improves outcomes enough to justify implementation costs?
As a microbiome therapeutics scientist, how can I characterize pharmacodynamic effects and safety risks of a live biotherapeutic product in patients receiving concomitant antibiotics?
As a counterfeit medicines investigator, how can I deploy portable analytical technologies to detect substandard antimalarials in low-resource supply chains?
As a drug repurposing lead, how can I identify approved compounds with credible mechanistic and clinical evidence for rapid evaluation in an emerging infectious disease outbreak?
As a clinical pharmacology reviewer, how can I determine whether a high-fat meal effect on exposure requires labeling restrictions or formulation redesign?
As a geriatric pharmacotherapy lead, how can I create a decision-support tool that balances efficacy, renal function, frailty, and polypharmacy risk when selecting anticoagulant therapy?

How can we experimentally distinguish between competing microscopic mechanisms for high-temperature superconductivity in cuprates and nickelates? What new spectroscopic or transport signatures would decisively separate spin-fluctuation-mediated pairing from alternative scenarios?

What is the nature of dark matter if it lies outside the traditional WIMP mass range? Can laboratory experiments, astrophysical observations, and precision cosmology be combined to identify sub-GeV or ultralight dark matter candidates?

Can quantum error correction be implemented in a scalable architecture without introducing prohibitive control complexity or correlated noise? What physical qubit platforms offer the most credible route to fault-tolerant quantum computation?
How does spacetime emerge from quantum entanglement in candidate theories of quantum gravity? Can this emergence be tested through concrete predictions in black hole physics or cosmology?
What mechanisms determine the onset of turbulence in strongly stratified or rotating fluids? Can a unified theory connect laboratory turbulence, atmospheric flows, and astrophysical accretion disks?

How do topological phases of matter persist or break down in the presence of strong interactions and disorder? Are there experimentally accessible signatures of fractionalized excitations in realistic materials?

What are the observable consequences of primordial gravitational waves beyond the simplest inflationary models? Can future cosmic microwave background or interferometer experiments distinguish between inflation, bouncing cosmologies, and phase-transition scenarios?

How do neutrino masses arise, and what do they imply about physics beyond the Standard Model? Can next-generation neutrinoless double beta decay and oscillation experiments determine whether neutrinos are Majorana particles?

What governs the dynamics of non-equilibrium quantum many-body systems far from thermal equilibrium? Can universal principles describe thermalization, localization, and chaos across different physical platforms?

How can we create and control room-temperature quantum materials with robust coherence and strong interactions? What design principles would enable practical quantum sensors or quantum networks based on such materials?

What is the equation of state of ultra-dense nuclear matter inside neutron stars? Can multimessenger observations of gravitational waves, X-rays, and radio pulsars constrain the existence of exotic phases such as quark matter?

How do magnetic reconnection and particle acceleration operate in collisionless plasmas? Can laboratory plasma experiments reproduce the key physics of solar flares, pulsar magnetospheres, and relativistic jets?
What physical processes set the efficiency limits of perovskite and tandem solar cells? Can defect dynamics, ion migration, and interfacial effects be controlled well enough for long-term stability?

How does chirality influence electron transport, spin selectivity, and optical response in molecular and nanoscale systems? Can chiral-induced spin selectivity be explained within a consistent microscopic theory?

What is the correct effective field theory description of strongly coupled systems with no quasiparticles? Can insights from holography, condensed matter, and hydrodynamics be unified into predictive frameworks?
How do black holes process quantum information during evaporation? Can recent developments in quantum extremal surfaces and replica wormholes be connected to measurable or simulatable phenomena?

What are the limits of precision measurement imposed by quantum mechanics, gravity, and environmental noise? Can new interferometric or optomechanical systems probe regimes where these limits become experimentally relevant?

How do active matter systems organize into collective states far from equilibrium? Can the physics of bacterial colonies, cellular tissues, and synthetic microswimmers be described by a common theoretical framework?

What new particles or interactions could be hidden in precision measurements of atomic, molecular, and optical systems? Can atomic clocks, electric dipole moment searches, and isotope-shift spectroscopy reveal physics beyond the Standard Model?
How do galaxies acquire and redistribute angular momentum across cosmic time? Can simulations and observations jointly resolve the roles of feedback, mergers, and environment in galaxy morphology?
What controls the glass transition at the microscopic level? Is there a universal theory that explains dynamical slowdown, aging, and spatial heterogeneity in both molecular and colloidal glasses?

How can we engineer photonic systems that simulate strongly interacting quantum matter? Are nonlinear, topological, or dissipative photonic platforms capable of realizing phases inaccessible in electronic materials?
What are the fundamental limits of heat transport at the nanoscale? How do quantum coherence, phonon hydrodynamics, and interfacial effects modify classical pictures of thermal conduction?

Can laboratory analogs of curved spacetime provide meaningful tests of quantum field theory in gravitational backgrounds? What phenomena, such as analogue Hawking radiation, can be observed unambiguously?

How do cosmic magnetic fields originate and evolve from the early universe to present-day galaxies and clusters? Can observations of Faraday rotation, gamma rays, and large-scale structure discriminate between primordial and astrophysical seeding mechanisms?
What is the role of entanglement in quantum phase transitions and critical phenomena? Can entanglement observables serve as practical diagnostics for phases that lack conventional order parameters?

How can nuclear fusion plasmas be stabilized under reactor-relevant conditions? What combination of magnetic confinement, materials engineering, and real-time control is required for economically viable fusion energy?
What physical principles govern the self-assembly of complex soft materials? Can we predict and program the formation of hierarchical structures from colloids, polymers, and biomolecular components?

How do axions or axion-like particles interact with electromagnetic fields in realistic astrophysical environments? Can upcoming haloscope, helioscope, and astrophysical searches close significant regions of parameter space?

What determines the maximum achievable luminosity and beam quality in future particle colliders? Can plasma wakefield acceleration or muon collider technologies overcome the limitations of conventional accelerators?

How do defects, strain, and moiré potentials reshape electronic phases in two-dimensional materials? Can twisted heterostructures be designed systematically to realize superconductivity, magnetism, and correlated insulators on demand?

What is the origin of the matter-antimatter asymmetry of the universe? Can electroweak baryogenesis, leptogenesis, or hidden-sector mechanisms be tested through collider experiments and precision observables?

How do quantum fluids behave under rotation, confinement, and strong interactions? Can ultracold atomic gases reveal universal vortex dynamics relevant to superfluid helium and neutron star interiors?

What mechanisms drive fast radio bursts, and why do some sources repeat while others appear not to? Can polarization, localization, and multiwavelength follow-up identify the underlying compact-object physics?

How can machine learning accelerate discovery in theoretical and experimental physics without sacrificing interpretability? What kinds of physical priors are necessary for models to extrapolate reliably beyond training data?
What are the microscopic origins of friction and wear at atomically smooth interfaces? Can nanoscale experiments and simulations produce a predictive theory of tribology from first principles?

How does quantum measurement emerge from unitary dynamics in realistic macroscopic systems? Can experiments with mesoscopic mechanical resonators, superconducting circuits, or matter-wave interferometers discriminate between interpretations or collapse models?

What are the transport properties of matter at extreme temperature and density, such as in the quark-gluon plasma? Can heavy-ion collision data reveal the viscosity, diffusion constants, and equilibration mechanisms of strongly interacting QCD matter?

How do biological systems exploit physical principles such as elasticity, stochasticity, and non-equilibrium energy flows? Can physics-based models predict morphogenesis, intracellular transport, or collective cell migration quantitatively?

What observational signatures would reveal deviations from general relativity on cosmological or strong-field scales? Can gravitational-wave catalogs, black hole imaging, and large-scale structure surveys jointly constrain modified gravity theories?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on which zoning reforms most effectively increase housing supply without accelerating displacement. Please compare outcomes from upzoning, missing-middle housing legalization, inclusionary zoning, and parking reform across comparable cities.

As a policy-maker, I need research on the public health and economic impacts of expanding protected bike lane networks. What evidence shows changes in crash rates, mode share, retail activity, and emissions after implementation?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how transit-oriented development affects housing affordability, ridership, and neighborhood change. Please identify policy safeguards that maximize access while minimizing displacement.

As a policy-maker, I need research on the effectiveness of congestion pricing in reducing traffic, air pollution, and commute times. Include evidence on equity impacts and how revenue allocation affects public support.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how urban tree canopy investments affect heat reduction, energy costs, public health, and property values. Please assess which targeting strategies best serve heat-vulnerable and low-income neighborhoods.

As a policy-maker, I need research on whether eliminating minimum parking requirements reduces housing costs and car dependency. Please compare impacts in cities that have fully or partially removed parking mandates.
As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the costs and benefits of converting vacant office buildings into housing. What regulatory, financial, and design barriers most affect feasibility?

As a policy-maker, I need research on how green infrastructure performs compared with gray infrastructure for stormwater management. Please assess flood reduction, maintenance costs, biodiversity benefits, and neighborhood equity outcomes.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the impact of bus rapid transit investments on travel times, ridership, land values, and access to jobs. Please identify design features associated with the strongest results.

As a policy-maker, I need research on strategies to prevent residential displacement during neighborhood revitalization. What evidence exists for rent stabilization, community land trusts, right-to-return policies, and targeted housing subsidies?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how mixed-use development influences walkability, local business vitality, and household transportation costs. Please distinguish impacts in downtown, suburban, and low-density contexts.

As a policy-maker, I need research on the relationship between urban density and greenhouse gas emissions. What density thresholds and complementary policies produce the greatest emissions reductions without undermining quality of life?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how school siting and neighborhood planning affect student transportation, safety, and educational access. Please evaluate policies that reduce car dependence and improve safe routes to school.

As a policy-maker, I need research on the effectiveness of accessory dwelling unit policies in expanding affordable housing options. Please assess permitting reforms, owner occupancy rules, financing barriers, and tenant outcomes.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on urban heat island mitigation strategies, including cool roofs, reflective pavements, trees, and shade structures. Which interventions provide the greatest benefits per public dollar invested?

As a policy-maker, I need research on how pedestrianization of commercial streets affects mobility, retail sales, public space use, and emergency access. Please compare temporary pilots with permanent street redesigns.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how freight and last-mile delivery policies affect congestion, emissions, and curb access. Please examine loading zones, microhubs, cargo bikes, delivery pricing, and off-peak delivery programs.

As a policy-maker, I need research on the impact of short-term rental regulations on housing availability, rents, tourism, and local tax revenue. What regulatory models have produced measurable housing benefits?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how public housing redevelopment affects resident well-being, affordability, and neighborhood integration. Please assess mixed-income models, one-for-one replacement, and resident participation requirements.

As a policy-maker, I need research on how urban design affects crime, perceived safety, and public space use. Please evaluate evidence for lighting, active frontages, street connectivity, maintenance, and community-led design.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the fiscal impacts of compact development versus low-density suburban expansion. Please compare infrastructure costs, tax revenue, service delivery costs, and long-term municipal liabilities.

As a policy-maker, I need research on how climate migration may affect urban housing, infrastructure, labor markets, and social services. What planning tools can help cities prepare for increased population inflows?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on equitable approaches to transit fare policy. Please compare free fares, discounted fares, fare capping, and targeted subsidies in terms of ridership, fiscal sustainability, and access for low-income residents.

As a policy-maker, I need research on the effectiveness of participatory planning processes. What evidence shows whether community engagement improves project legitimacy, equity outcomes, implementation speed, or public trust?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the land-use and transportation effects of remote and hybrid work. How should cities adapt downtown planning, transit service, housing policy, and commercial districts?

As a policy-maker, I need research on strategies for revitalizing declining downtowns after retail and office vacancies rise. Please evaluate housing conversion, cultural districts, public realm investment, university partnerships, and small-business support.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how urban agriculture affects food security, land use, community cohesion, and environmental outcomes. Please identify where community gardens, rooftop farms, and commercial urban farms are most effective.

As a policy-maker, I need research on the role of community land trusts in preserving long-term affordability and preventing displacement. Please assess scalability, financing models, governance structures, and impacts on wealth-building.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the effects of highway removal or capping projects on mobility, air quality, public health, and neighborhood reconnection. Please include lessons on equity and avoiding speculative displacement.

As a policy-maker, I need research on how curb management can balance parking, transit, cycling, delivery, ride-hailing, and public space needs. What pricing and allocation strategies produce measurable improvements?

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on planning standards for age-friendly cities. Which housing, transportation, public space, and service-access interventions best support older adults aging in place?

As a policy-maker, I need research on how land value capture can finance transit, affordable housing, and infrastructure. Please compare tax increment financing, special assessment districts, development charges, and joint development.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the impact of complete streets policies on traffic safety, accessibility, and mode shift. Please assess which implementation and enforcement mechanisms lead to durable safety improvements.

As a policy-maker, I need research on how informal settlements and unpermitted housing can be upgraded while protecting residents. What evidence exists on tenure security, infrastructure provision, participatory upgrading, and anti-eviction safeguards?
As a policy-maker, I need evidence on the planning implications of autonomous vehicles. How might they affect parking demand, congestion, land use, transit ridership, street design, and equity?

As a policy-maker, I need research on the benefits and risks of smart city technologies in urban planning. Please assess evidence on service efficiency, privacy, surveillance risks, digital exclusion, and governance safeguards.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how waterfront redevelopment can improve resilience, public access, housing, and economic development. What planning models balance flood protection with equity and environmental restoration?

As a policy-maker, I need research on how mega-events affect long-term urban development. Please assess evidence on infrastructure legacy, housing displacement, public debt, tourism, and post-event land use.

As a policy-maker, I need evidence on how neighborhood-level access to parks affects physical activity, mental health, social cohesion, and property values. Please identify park investment strategies that avoid green gentrification.

As a policy-maker, I need research on the effectiveness of integrated regional planning for housing, transportation, and climate goals. What governance structures and fiscal incentives help municipalities coordinate across boundaries?

How do humans integrate probabilistic sensory evidence with prior beliefs during rapid decision-making under uncertainty? What computational mechanisms best explain individual differences in this integration?
To what extent does inner speech contribute to executive control, and how does its role vary across linguistic, developmental, and neurodivergent populations?
How are abstract concepts represented in the brain when they lack direct sensory referents? Can grounded cognition models account for concepts such as justice, infinity, or causality?
What cognitive mechanisms underlie the formation and persistence of false memories? How do social cues, emotional arousal, and repeated retrieval interact in this process?

How does sleep-dependent memory consolidation differ across declarative, procedural, and emotional learning? What neural signatures predict whether a memory will be strengthened, transformed, or forgotten?
How do infants infer causal structure from limited and noisy observations? What role do innate biases versus early statistical learning play in the emergence of causal reasoning?
What are the cognitive and neural bases of human metacognition, and why are confidence judgments sometimes poorly calibrated to actual performance?

How does bilingualism shape attention, cognitive control, and conceptual representation across the lifespan? Are reported cognitive advantages best explained by language experience, socioeconomic factors, or task-specific demands?
What mechanisms allow humans to understand other minds, and how do these mechanisms differ between explicit theory-of-mind reasoning and spontaneous social prediction?
How does chronic stress alter attention, working memory, and decision-making? Which changes are adaptive responses to threat, and which reflect cognitive impairment?
Can predictive processing frameworks explain perception, action, and cognition within a unified model? What empirical findings would most strongly challenge such frameworks?
How do people construct coherent narratives from fragmented autobiographical memories? What cognitive processes determine which events become central to identity?
What is the relationship between attention and consciousness? Can unattended stimuli become conscious, and what experimental paradigms can distinguish access from awareness?
How do humans learn categories in high-dimensional environments, and when do they rely on rules, prototypes, exemplars, or hybrid representations?
What cognitive processes support creativity, and how do associative thinking, executive control, and domain expertise interact during creative problem-solving?
How do emotions influence moral judgment across cultures? Are moral intuitions driven primarily by affective responses, reasoning processes, or their interaction?
What is the role of the body in cognition, particularly in domains such as language comprehension, numerical reasoning, and social understanding?
How do people adapt their learning strategies in response to feedback, uncertainty, and changing task demands? What distinguishes flexible learners from rigid learners?
How does digital media multitasking affect sustained attention, memory encoding, and cognitive control? Are observed effects causal, reversible, or dependent on preexisting traits?
What neural and cognitive mechanisms enable humans to imagine future events? How does episodic future thinking influence planning, self-control, and emotional regulation?
How do cultural practices shape perception and cognition? Which cognitive processes are universal, and which are systematically altered by language, education, and social norms?
What are the cognitive foundations of mathematical reasoning? How do approximate number sense, spatial cognition, language, and formal education interact in mathematical development?
How do humans detect, evaluate, and revise their own errors during complex tasks? What factors determine whether error awareness leads to behavioral adjustment?
What mechanisms explain the relationship between language and thought? Does linguistic structure shape cognition in stable ways, or primarily influence task performance and attention?
How do social norms become internalized as cognitive constraints on behavior? What roles do reward learning, reputation management, and identity play in norm compliance?
What is the cognitive architecture of working memory, and how should capacity limits be characterized? Are limits best explained by discrete slots, continuous resources, or interference dynamics?
How do people reason about risk in real-world contexts such as health, finance, and climate change? Why do probability judgments often diverge from normative models?
How do hallucinations and delusions arise from ordinary perceptual and inferential mechanisms? Can computational models of prediction and belief updating bridge clinical and nonclinical experiences?
What processes enable robust object recognition despite changes in viewpoint, lighting, occlusion, and context? How do human recognition strategies compare with those of deep neural networks?
How does attention select information in naturalistic environments where goals, salience, and learned relevance compete? Can laboratory models of attention generalize to real-world behavior?

What cognitive mechanisms support cooperation in groups, especially when individual and collective interests conflict? How do trust, punishment, communication, and shared identity influence cooperative decisions?
How do children acquire pragmatic language skills such as irony, implicature, and indirect requests? What role do social cognition and conversational experience play in this development?
What determines whether a learned skill transfers to new contexts? How do abstraction, practice variability, feedback, and metacognitive awareness influence transfer?
How do humans represent and reason about time? What cognitive and neural systems support duration perception, temporal ordering, and mental time travel?
How does aging affect the balance between accumulated knowledge and fluid cognitive flexibility? Which cognitive changes reflect neural decline, compensatory strategies, or shifts in motivation?
What is the role of curiosity in learning and exploration? How do uncertainty, expected information gain, and intrinsic reward interact to guide information-seeking behavior?
How do people make sense of ambiguous social information, such as facial expressions, tone of voice, or online messages? What biases shape interpretation under uncertainty?

What cognitive mechanisms underlie expertise in domains such as chess, music, medicine, or programming? How do pattern recognition, memory organization, and deliberate practice contribute to expert performance?

How do artificial cognitive agents change human reasoning, trust, and decision-making when used as collaborators? What factors determine whether people appropriately rely on or reject algorithmic advice?
What are the cognitive consequences of loneliness and social isolation? How do reduced social interaction and altered threat perception affect memory, attention, and social cognition?
How can ideas from ecology help urban planners design cities that are both more livable for humans and more supportive of nonhuman species?

As a distribution utility planner, how can I prioritize feeder upgrades for neighborhoods with rapidly growing rooftop solar, EV adoption, and heat pump loads while minimizing ratepayer costs and outage risk?
As an operator of a large wind farm, what predictive maintenance strategy should I use to reduce gearbox and blade failures using SCADA data, weather forecasts, and inspection records?
As a battery storage developer, how can I optimize revenue stacking across energy arbitrage, capacity markets, frequency regulation, and resilience services without accelerating battery degradation?
As a solar EPC contractor, what construction and procurement practices can reduce delays caused by transformer shortages, permitting bottlenecks, and interconnection queue uncertainty?
As a municipal energy manager, how can I design a cost-effective building electrification roadmap that phases out gas heating while preserving reliability during winter peak demand?
As a transmission system operator, what methods can I use to identify the highest-value transmission upgrades needed to integrate offshore wind and reduce curtailment?
As an industrial plant manager, how can I determine whether green hydrogen, electrification, biomass, or carbon capture is the best pathway to decarbonize high-temperature process heat?
As a refinery operator, what operational changes and monitoring technologies can most effectively reduce methane, flaring, and fugitive emissions while maintaining production targets?
As an EV charging network operator, how can I site and size fast-charging stations to maximize utilization, avoid grid constraints, and serve freight, ride-hailing, and consumer demand?
As a rural electric cooperative, how can I evaluate whether a microgrid with solar, storage, and backup generation improves resilience enough to justify investment?
As a power market analyst, how will increasing zero-marginal-cost renewable generation affect price volatility, capacity adequacy, and investment signals over the next decade?
As a district heating provider, how can I transition from fossil fuel boilers to geothermal, heat pumps, waste heat, and thermal storage without disrupting customer service?
As a mining company supplying lithium or nickel, how can I reduce energy use, water consumption, and emissions while meeting growing battery supply chain demand?
As a cement manufacturer, what combination of alternative fuels, clinker substitution, electrified kilns, and carbon capture offers the lowest-cost route to deep emissions reductions?
As a grid reliability engineer, how can I assess the system impacts of retiring coal plants while adding inverter-based resources, storage, and demand response?
As a corporate energy buyer, how can I structure power purchase agreements that deliver credible emissions reductions, price stability, and protection from basis risk?
As an oil and gas producer, how can I use satellite, aerial, and ground-based methane detection data to prioritize repairs and verify emissions reductions for regulators and customers?
As a port authority, how can I plan shore power, hydrogen bunkering, and electric cargo-handling equipment to reduce emissions from ships and freight operations?
As a data center operator, how can I procure 24/7 carbon-free energy while meeting strict uptime requirements and managing exposure to volatile electricity prices?
As a utility customer programs director, how can I design demand response incentives that reliably reduce peak load from residential HVAC, EV chargers, and commercial buildings?
As a nuclear plant owner, what business case supports life extension, uprates, or hybrid operation with hydrogen production in a market with growing renewables?
As a geothermal developer, how can I identify commercially viable enhanced geothermal sites by integrating subsurface data, drilling costs, grid access, and offtake opportunities?
As a renewable asset manager, how can I quantify and mitigate revenue losses from curtailment, negative pricing, congestion, and basis risk across a project portfolio?
As a city transportation planner, how can I evaluate the grid, emissions, and cost impacts of electrifying municipal buses, refuse trucks, and light-duty fleets?
As a building owner, how can I use energy management systems, smart controls, and retrofit sequencing to reduce consumption while maintaining tenant comfort and lease competitiveness?
As a hydrogen project developer, how can I determine the optimal electrolyzer size, storage capacity, renewable supply mix, and offtake contract structure for bankability?
As a carbon capture project sponsor, how can I assess capture technology performance, transport and storage risks, permitting timelines, and long-term liability for an industrial hub?
As a utility regulator, how should I evaluate performance-based ratemaking mechanisms that encourage reliability, affordability, decarbonization, and distributed energy resource integration?
As an offshore wind developer, how can I reduce project risk from vessel availability, subsea cable failures, wildlife concerns, and changing power market conditions?
As a bioenergy producer, how can I verify feedstock sustainability, manage supply variability, and quantify lifecycle emissions for renewable natural gas or sustainable aviation fuel?
As a pipeline operator, how can I evaluate the technical and safety requirements for blending hydrogen into existing natural gas infrastructure?
As a power plant operator, how can I use flexible operations, thermal storage, or hybridization with renewables to keep gas assets profitable in a low-capacity-factor future?
As an energy storage manufacturer, how can I reduce supply chain exposure to critical minerals through chemistry selection, recycling, and diversified procurement?
As a cybersecurity lead at an electric utility, how can I assess and reduce cyber risk from distributed energy resources, smart meters, and third-party aggregators?
As a disaster resilience planner, how can I identify which energy assets are most vulnerable to wildfires, floods, heat waves, and storms, and prioritize hardening investments?
As an airline sustainability executive, how can I secure sustainable aviation fuel supply at scale while managing cost premiums, feedstock constraints, and emissions accounting?
As a retail energy provider, how can I design dynamic pricing products that reduce peak demand, save customers money, and avoid disproportionately burdening low-income households?
As a waste management company, how can I compare landfill gas-to-energy, renewable natural gas upgrading, and onsite electrification as pathways to lower emissions and generate revenue?
As a battery recycling operator, how can I optimize collection, sorting, hydrometallurgical recovery, and resale channels to improve economics and reduce lifecycle emissions?

As an energy finance team, how can I stress-test renewable, storage, and grid infrastructure investments against interest rate changes, policy uncertainty, supply chain delays, and merchant price risk?

Review this brief interdisciplinary proposal integrating genetics, bioethics, and public communication. Comment on how well it anticipates misinterpretation, privacy concerns, and societal impact.

Review this 2-3 sentence proposal at the intersection of sports science, wearable technology, and labor studies. Evaluate whether it considers athlete autonomy, data ownership, and workplace surveillance.
